title: JSON Object
documentation:
## Purpose
Represents a single JSON object (key-value map) as the primary payload. The `record` tag indicates a structured mapping, making this type suitable for configuration objects, API responses, and any structured data with named fields.

## When to use
Use `media:json;textable;record` when a node produces or consumes a JSON object at the top level. For a JSON array of objects, use [JSON Array of Objects](https://capdag.com/browse/media:json;list;record;textable). For a bare JSON value that may not be an object, use [JSON Value](https://capdag.com/browse/media:json;textable).

## Notes
The `textable` tag allows this type to flow to any generic text consumer. Structured nodes should parse the JSON before processing field values.
